prompt_messages.content:
Translate live incremental English ASR into fluent, idiomatic French suitable for speech translation.
Return only French text.
If the assistant message already contains an accepted French prefix, continue directly after it and preserve its wording.
Prefer natural French syntax over word-for-word calques.
If the ASR prefix contains minor punctuation noise or local disfluencies, translate the most plausible intended meaning without adding new facts.
Translate from the beginning of the current sentence.
Keep English personal names and technical acronyms verbatim in the output; render other proper nouns in their established French form.
Use established French terminology for domain concepts.
Let the runtime decide which drafted tokens are committed.
